prestazioni: Engine: RB25DET NEO (2.5L inline-6, 280ps stock) – Full forged internals with Tomei 87mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a Tomei Type-M 77mm stroker crank to achieve 2.8L displacement. Paired with a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (1.05 A/R, 62mm compressor) on a custom 3-inch stainless steel turbo manifold by HKS, supporting 1.5 bar of boost with a Tomei M82 fuel pump and Nismo 740cc injectors.

Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way) with 4.375 final gear ratio in the stock R200 differential housing, mated to a PPG straight-cut 6-speed dog engagement gearset (1st: 2.583, 2nd: 1.857, 3rd: 1.310, 4th: 1.000, 5th: 0.821, 6th: 0.714) with a Nismo twin-plate ceramic clutch (240mm) and lightweight flywheel (4.5kg).

Suspension & Handling: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for Stagea Autech chassis) with 24-way compression/rebound damping adjustability, poly bushings (SuperPro 60mm front control arms, rear subframe), and a Cusco front strut tower bar (22mm hollow section). Braking: Endless 6-pot front calipers (355mm rotors) with CC-RX brake pads and Project Mu 2-pot rear calipers (330mm rotors), paired with stainless steel braided lines and Motul RBF660 brake fluid.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny Stagea V3 widebody kit (carbon fiber front bumper, overfenders, and rear diffuser) with a custom 3D-printed rear wing mount for a dry carbon fiber Voltex Type-7 rear wing (1,800mm width, 300mm chord, 25mm thickness) at 12° angle. Front canards by Varis Japan (carbon fiber, 3-piece set) and a custom aluminum radiator support for improved airflow.

Exterior: Full respray in Nissan ‘Active Red’ (code: AJ1) with a matte clear coat by Glasurit 90 Line, paired with Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x9.5 +22 front, 18x10.5 +30 rear) in ‘Gun Metallic’ finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear). Side markers replaced with LED units from Jun Auto (sequential turn signals).

Interior: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (fixed-back, carbon fiber shell) with Takata 4-point harnesses, wrapped in Alcantara (custom ‘Nismo Red’ stitching). Dashboard and door cards retrimmed in black Alcantara with red contrast stitching by Status Racing. Custom roll cage by AutoPower (8-point, mild steel, 1.75x0.120 wall thickness) with bolt-in X-brace for chassis rigidity, painted in Nissan ‘Silica Bronze’ (code: K23).
